skills.name: Circle Wings
skills.description: Requires {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Vigor of Battlefield] X 8. [Embody {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Vigor of Battlefield] and unleash it on a single target for damage.

skills.name: Rising Wings
skills.description: Summons 3 spears in front of you, then creates a zone of darkness that deals damage.

skills.name: Giant Wings
skills.description: Summons a giant spear that thrusts forward and swings wildly in all directions for damage.

skills.name: Wind Pulse
skills.description: Generates a shock wave with the spear and fires it forward.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6

skills.name: Impulse Spears
skills.description: Casts a series of stabs, building up energy, and releases it with a powerful thrust.

skills.name: Battle Spirit
skills.description: Consume {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Vigor of Battlefield] X 10 to enhance yourself. A Winged Hussar skill damage increases. Explosion Spears additionally receive Critical Damage up to +50% effect.
skills.effect_text:
Damage + CaptionRatio %
Explosion Spears Critical Damage + CaptionRatio2 %
Duration 60 seconds

skills.name: Explosion Spears
skills.description: Consume {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Vigor of Battlefield] X 10 to throw an exploding spear to the front. This skill does not make {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Vigor of Battlefield].

attributes.name: [Arts] Battle Spirit: Battle Roar
attributes.description: * Skill effect is changed to Final Damage increase effect. This is applied to all attack skills and party members. The increase value is reduced and the Critical Damage increase effect of Explosion Spears is removed.

attributes.description: * Attack range changes to a straight line and knocks enemies hit into the air.

attributes.name: Rising Wings: Bind
attributes.description: * The number of hits is halved, but centers the enemy and [Bind] them for 3 seconds.
